description_long: This storage box is a large, rectangular container with a robust, industrial design, featuring a smooth, solid exterior in a uniform tan or light brown color. The box has a recessed top section, likely serving as a lid, with subtle panel lines suggesting it can be opened or removed. The front and back sides display three prominent horizontal indents or slats, which may function as reinforcement or aesthetic detailing. The sides are plain, with no visible handles or openings, emphasizing a minimalist and utilitarian style. The overall construction appears to be made from a durable material such as metal or heavy-duty plastic, suitable for outdoor or garage use. The box is designed to sit on the ground and can support objects placed on its flat top surface.
description: A large, tan rectangular storage box with a recessed lid and horizontal slats on the front and back, made from sturdy material and designed for floor placement.
description_view_0: Front view showing three horizontal slats and a recessed lid area, with clean, solid surfaces.
description_view_1: Side view with a plain, uninterrupted surface and the recessed lid visible at the top.
description_view_2: Back view mirroring the front, with three horizontal slats and the recessed lid.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the first side, with a plain surface and visible recessed lid.
